repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: finite joint-completion LP sharpness for ADE under one misspecified treatment exposure map; current theorem adds IV take-up and dual exposure maps

published_prior_art.cite: manski1990 generic bounded-outcome partial identification; hoshino_yanagi_2024_noncompliance_unknown_interference identifies IV-interference complier parameters; schroder_oprescu_feuerriegel_kallus_2026_networks_partialid gives misspecified-exposure bounds without IV compliance

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: shared-edge nonsharpness for treatment exposure alone; no in-catalogue network-IV dual-map compliance geometry

published_prior_art.cite: hoshino_yanagi_2024_noncompliance_unknown_interference plus schroder_oprescu_feuerriegel_kallus_2026_networks_partialid are closest but do not give a shared completion plus shared monotone take-up strict-gap theorem

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1 has shared-edge compatibility motifs but no IV-compliance four-unit dual-exposure hub witness

published_prior_art.cite: imai_jiang_malani_2021_interference_noncompliance identifies complier direct/spillover effects under two-stage designs, but not finite-network incompatibility under dual exposure-map misspecification

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked observable law is P_{I,Z,D,S,T,Y;pi_Z,L} and the handoff claims full Z,D,S,T cell-law matching, but Section 6 defines Psi(P) only through unit-level p_{i,z,d,s,t} and outcome means, so 'sharp for P' is actually sharp for a coarsened summary.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The product relaxation T_C^{prod}(P) depends on undefined phrases such as 'unitwise feasible in isolation' and 'marginal ranges attainable from some feasible completion,' so the comparison set is not yet a precise mathematical object.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make the observable-law convention consistent: either relock P to the unit-level marginal summary Psi(P), or expand Assumption matching and Theorem 1 to match the full observed vector law of (Z,D,S,T,Y).
Replace the prose definition of T_C^{prod}(P) with explicit finite variables and linear constraints for Q^D, Q^Z, Lambda, latent means, observable matching, and unitwise support feasibility.
Add one sentence in the parent-reduction corollary identifying exactly which parent weights q_{i,s,r}(G) are recovered from omega_{i,s,t,rD,rZ}(G) under D=Z, T=S, and R^Z=R^D.

recommended_next_step: Patch the P versus Psi convention and formalize the product comparator; the novelty upgrade itself survives.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The draft strictly widens the parent from one misspecified treatment-exposure map to IV noncompliance with shared treatment and instrumental exposure misspecification, with an explicit parent corner under D=Z and T=S.
